text.title: Error Handling (RFC 7807 Problem Details) Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every Error Handling (RFC 7807 Problem Details) application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 7807 + RFC 9457. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: `type` is a stable URI (e.g. `https://api.example.com/errors/insufficient-funds`), not a free-form code.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 7807. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Every envelope MUST include `traceId` matching the observability span.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: OpenTelemetry trace-context. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: ONE global exception handler MUST map every error type to the envelope; no per-route ad-hoc shapes.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Reviews + maintainability. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Field-level validation errors MUST go in a structured `errors[]` array, not in `detail` prose.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 7807 + ProblemDetails examples. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: `status` field MUST equal the HTTP status code on the response line.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 7807. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Stack traces MUST NOT appear in `detail` or `instance`; log them server-side only.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: OWASP API security top 10. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
